Description: The TPS61022 is a high-efficiency, monolithic synchronous boost converter designed to generate a stable output voltage (2.2 V to 5.5 V) from an extremely low input voltage source (0.5 V to 5.5 V). It integrates two power MOSFETs, operates at a high switching frequency (0.6 MHz to 1 MHz), and is optimized for applications like supercapacitor backup and battery-powered devices where the input can dip very low. It features selectable power-saving modes, comprehensive protection, and a very small solution size.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Ground reference for the IC. The ground pad of the output capacitor must be placed close to this pin.
Connection to the drain of the internal low-side power MOSFET and the source of the internal high-side power MOSFET. This is the power switching node.
Boost converter output. The VOUT pad of the output capacitor must be placed close to this pin.
Voltage feedback input for setting the output voltage via an external resistor divider.
Logic input to enable (high) or disable/shutdown (low) the device.
Logic input to select light-load operation mode: high for Forced PWM, low for Auto PFM.
Power supply input pin for the IC.
